title: CobbleCuisine Friends
description: An addon pack for CobbleCuisine that adds compatibility with the Friends Forever mod.
body:
Ths pack is an addon pack for CobbleCuisine that adds compatibility with the Friends Forever mod. 

Specifically, the pack allows **Poke Puffs, Malasadas and Cakes from CobbleCuisine** to be used as **foods that can be fed to wild Pokemon for the Friends Forever mod**. Each of the foods has a flavor value associated with it, that will make the Pokemon more likely to join your team. 

Poke Puffs have a base Affection value of 10, Cakes have 15 and Malasadas have 20. The flavors for each are as follows: 

- Sweet Poke Puff - Sweet
- Citrus Poke Puff - Sour
- Spice Poke Puff - Spicy
- Mint Poke Puff - Dry
- Mocha Poke Puff - Bitter
  
- Sweet Malasada - Sweet 
- Sour Malasada - Sour
- Spicy Malasada - Spicy
- Dry Malasada - Dry
- Bitter Malasada - Bitter
  
- Blue Bean Cake - Bitter & Dry 
- Green Bean Cake - Sour & Dry
- Orange Bean Cake - Sweet & Bitter
- Red Bean Cake - Sweet & Spicy
- Yellow Bean Cake - Bitter & Sour
- Berry Grain Cake - Sweet & Dry 
- Seed Grain Cake - Bitter & Dry 
- Fruit Honey Cake - Sweet & Sour
- Vegetable Honey Cake - Sweet & Bitter
- Brown Mushroom Cake - Sour & Spicy
- Red Mushroom Cake - Bitter & Spicy
- Twin Mushroom Cake - Dry & Spicy 
- Salt Cake - Dry & Spicy
